name: Pollo Ai Peperoni (Bkd Mrntd Chkn W/peprs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Carefully clean and wash the chicken.
Cut each chicken into 8 pieces.
2. Place the pieces in a large bowl.
Squeeze lemons over the chicken pieces.
Coarsely chop the parsley and add to the bowl.
Add the first measure of olive oil, then sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Mix together with a wooden spoon.
Let marinate for 1 hour, turning the pieces after 30 minutes.
3. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Clean the peppers by removing stems, ribs, and seeds.
Cut the peppers into rings (no more than 1/2 inch thick).
5. Using tongs, transfer the chicken pieces (with some parsley still clinging) to a baking dish.
Pour the second measure of oil over the chicken pieces.
6. Bake for 35 minutes.
7. Transfer marinade to a saucepan and heat over medium heat.
Add the peppers to the hot marinade and sauté for 20 minutes.
8. Remove the chicken from the oven and transfer to a serving dish.
Arrange the peppers and sauce around the chicken.
Serve immediately.
